import native from './lib/nativeMath';
export default Math;

code_items.intent: Removed the code that exported all Math properties to module.exports and replaced it with a direct assignment of the Math object, then subsequently removed the entire export block entirely.

Added a count increment before returning the sigma function call to ensure the counter is updated for the last line processed. & Adjusted the ASCII art representation of the sigma notation style to correct the visual alignment of the expression relative to the sigma symbol. & Extended the expression parser to support square root (√) and trigonometric functions (sin, cos, tan, asin, acos, atan), along with variable names (a-z), by updating the `isNum` and `toNum` functions accordingly.
